rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: arcade-style with escalating enemy density; designed for repeat play and speedrunning optimization

difficulty_curve.early_game: tutorial-like introduction to basic combat mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: enemy variety increases; platforming complexity introduced
difficulty_curve.late_game: boss encounters and combined challenge scenarios
notable_spikes: transition from pure combat to platforming hybrid sections

notable_level_patterns.description: Levels progress through escalating enemy waves with increasing difficulty and variety between encounters
Early levels emphasize beat-em-up combat; later levels integrate platforming challenges
Level design supports sequence-breaking and optimized routing; 3m41s speedrun completion time suggests linear but efficient progression

limitations: Source contains leaderboard data only; lacks detailed level layout, enemy placement, or mechanical documentation. Analysis inferred from speedrun times, game paradigm, and genre conventions.
